item.title: v1.0.96
item.description: What's Changed fix: handle fork PRs by fetching via refs/pull/N/head by @stakeswky in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/963 New Contributors @stakeswky made their first contribution in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/963 Full Changelog: https://github.com

item.title: v1.0.94
item.description: What's Changed Prepend system bin dirs to PATH when allowednonwriteusers is set by @OctavianGuzu in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1208 Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.94

item.title: v1.0.91
item.description: What's Changed Use pinned bun binary for post-steps when allowednonwriteusers is set by @OctavianGuzu in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1190 Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.91

item.title: v1.0.90
item.description: What's Changed fix: forward MCPTIMEOUT, MCPTOOLTIMEOUT, MAXMCPOUTPUTTOKENS to action step by @qozle in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1162 security: reject PATHTOCLAUDECODEEXECUTABLE with control characters by @qozle in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1

item.title: v1.0.89
item.description: What's Changed fix: skip token revocation when no token was acquired by @Dave-London in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/918 Use env vars for workflowrun context values in example workflows by @ddworken in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1125 docs: docum

item.title: Claude Code GitHub Action v1.0
item.description:
🎉 Claude Code GitHub Action v1.0 - Now Generally Available!
We're excited to announce the v1.0 release of Claude Code GitHub Action! This major release brings significant improvements in simplicity, flexibility, and power to AI-assisted development workflows.
🚀 What's New in v1.0
Simpli
